18th-judicial-district-das-office-la-pd.name: 18th Judicial District DA's Office- LA PD

acratt-ca.name: ACRATT -CA
acratt-ca.notes: Alameda County Regional Auto Theft Task Force (ACRATT). Multi-agency task force.

burbank-airport-ca-pd.name: Burbank Airport CA PD
burbank-airport-ca-pd.notes: Hollywood Burbank Airport Police. Airport is owned by the Burbank-Glendale-Pasadena Airport Authority, a public joint powers authority.

ca-iipay-nation-of-santa-ysabel.name: CA Iipay Nation of Santa Ysabel

ca-napa-valley-college-campus.name: CA - Napa Valley College Campus
ca-napa-valley-college-campus.notes: Public community college (Napa Valley College). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

cal-state-san-bernadino-ca-pd.name: Cal State San Bernadino CA PD

california-state-university-long-beach-c.name: California State University Long Beach Campus PD
california-state-university-long-beach-c.notes: Public university (CSU Long Beach). Part of the California State University system.

cerritos-college-ca-pd.name: Cerritos College CA PD
cerritos-college-ca-pd.notes: Public community college (Cerritos College). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

chabot-college-campus-safety-security-de.name: Chabot College Campus Safety & Security Department CA
chabot-college-campus-safety-security-de.notes: Public community college (Chabot College). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

chaffey-college-pd-ca.name: Chaffey College PD (CA)
chaffey-college-pd-ca.notes: Public community college (Chaffey College). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

cornerstone-community-school-ca.name: Cornerstone Community School (CA)
cornerstone-community-school-ca.notes: Private school receiving ALPR data from law enforcement agencies. Sharing ALPR data with this entity likely violates CA Civil Code §1798.90.55(b), which restricts ALPR data sharing to public agencies only. Not a public agency under §1798.90.5(f). CDE listing.

dnu-santa-clara-university-campus-safety.name: DNU - Santa Clara University Campus Safety (Raven)
dnu-santa-clara-university-campus-safety.notes: Santa Clara University is a private institution. Entry marked "Do Not Use" by Flock but still appears in sharing lists. Sharing ALPR data with this entity likely violates CA Civil Code §1798.90.55(b), which restricts ALPR data sharing to public agencies only.

el-cajon-ca-pd.name: El Cajon CA PD
el-cajon-ca-pd.notes: Sued by the CA Attorney General for illegally sharing ALPR data with out-of-state agencies in violation of SB 34 (CA Civil Code §1798.90.55(b)). AG press release.

ncric.name: NCRIC
ncric.notes: NCRIC is a re-sharing hub: agencies that share with NCRIC have their data redistributed to 318 entities, including private universities (Stanford, USF, UOP) that do not qualify as public agencies under SB 34. An agency sharing with NCRIC may not be aware its data reaches non-public entities. NCRIC's ALPR Policy authorizes multi-agency sharing, integration, and access of ALPR data among participating agencies. See also: NCRIC Data Sharing MOU.

north-kern-cemetery-district-ca-pd.name: North Kern Cemetery District CA PD

old.name: Old
old.notes: Not a public agency. Receives ALPR data from at least 2 agencies (Lodi PD, Merced County SO).

orange-coast-college-campus-ca-pd.name: Orange Coast College Campus CA PD
orange-coast-college-campus-ca-pd.notes: Public community college (Orange Coast College). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

rio-hondo-college-pd-ca.name: Rio Hondo College PD CA
rio-hondo-college-pd-ca.notes: Public community college (Rio Hondo College). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

riv-co-arson-tf-ca-pd.name: RIV CO ARSON TF CA PD

rohnert-park-department-of-public-safety.name: Rohnert Park Department of Public Safety (CA)

san-bernardino-community-college-ca-pd.name: San Bernardino Community College CA PD
san-bernardino-community-college-ca-pd.notes: Public community college (San Bernardino Valley College). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

san-bernardino-county-ca-human-services-.name: San Bernardino County CA Human Services [Law Enforcement]

san-joaquin-delta-college-pd-ca.name: San Joaquin Delta College PD (CA)
san-joaquin-delta-college-pd-ca.notes: Public community college (San Joaquin Delta College). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

san-jose-evergreen-community-college-cam.name: San Jose - Evergreen Community College Campus PD CA
san-jose-evergreen-community-college-cam.notes: Public community college (San Jose-Evergreen CCD). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

san-jose-state-university-ca.name: San Jose State University CA
san-jose-state-university-ca.notes: Public university (San Jose State University). Part of the California State University system.

santa-rosa-band-of-cahuilla-indians-ca.name: Santa Rosa Band of Cahuilla Indians CA

sequoias-community-college-district-ca-p.name: Sequoias Community College District CA PD
sequoias-community-college-district-ca-p.notes: Public community college (College of the Sequoias). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

stanford-university-ca-pd.name: Stanford University CA PD
stanford-university-ca-pd.notes: Private university. Sharing ALPR data with this entity likely violates CA Civil Code §1798.90.55(b), which restricts ALPR data sharing to public agencies only. Stanford is not a public agency under §1798.90.5(f).

uc-irvine-campus-pd-ca.name: UC Irvine Campus PD CA
uc-irvine-campus-pd-ca.notes: Public university (UC Irvine). Part of the University of California system.

union-pacific-railroad-pd.name: Union Pacific Railroad PD
union-pacific-railroad-pd.notes: Union Pacific Railroad Police is a private railroad police force. While railroad police have some law enforcement authority under federal law (49 USC §28101), Union Pacific is a private corporation. Not a public agency under CA Civil Code §1798.90.5(f).

university-of-ca-santa-barbara-ca-pd.name: University of CA - Santa Barbara CA PD
university-of-ca-santa-barbara-ca-pd.notes: Public university (UC Santa Barbara). Part of the University of California system.

university-of-california-berkeley.name: University of California, Berkeley
university-of-california-berkeley.notes: Public university (UC Berkeley). Part of the University of California system.

university-of-san-francisco-ca-pd.name: University of San Francisco CA PD
university-of-san-francisco-ca-pd.notes: Private Jesuit university. Sharing ALPR data with this entity likely violates CA Civil Code §1798.90.55(b), which restricts ALPR data sharing to public agencies only. USF is not a public agency under §1798.90.5(f).

university-of-the-pacific-ca.name: University of the Pacific (CA)
university-of-the-pacific-ca.notes: Private university. Sharing ALPR data with this entity likely violates CA Civil Code §1798.90.55(b), which restricts ALPR data sharing to public agencies only. UOP Chief of Police confirmed in writing that University of the Pacific is "a private institution and therefore not subject to the CPRA." UOP was removed from SMPD’s portal after a resident raised the issue; it remains on Stockton PD’s portal. (Findings, Source 29)

ventura-county-district-attorneys-office.name: Ventura County District Attorney's Office CA

west-valley-mission-college-dist-campus-.name: West Valley Mission College Dist Campus (CA)
west-valley-mission-college-dist-campus-.notes: Public community college (West Valley-Mission CCD). Part of the California Community Colleges system.

western-states-information-network-ca.name: Western States Information Network (CA)
western-states-information-network-ca.notes: Federally funded intelligence center. One of six RISS centers funded by Congress through the U.S. DOJ. Serves Alaska, California, Hawaii, Oregon, and Washington. CA DOJ page. Multi-state sharing hub — data shared with WSIN may be redistributed across five states and international partners.

flock-safety-vendor.name: Flock Safety (vendor)
flock-safety-vendor.notes: Private surveillance vendor headquartered in Atlanta, GA. Flock MSA §5.3 grants Flock independent authority to "access, use, preserve and/or disclose" agency footage to law enforcement, government officials, and third parties based on Flock's own "good faith belief" — including for Flock's own technical purposes. No agency approval or notification required. This provision survives contract termination (§7.3). The CA State Auditor (Report 2019-118) found that agencies' vendor contracts lacked necessary data security safeguards and recommended agencies update vendor contracts. The subsequent AG Bulletin 2023-DLE-06 directed agencies to review vendor contracts for provisions allowing non-public access to ALPR data — §5.3 is exactly the type of provision both warned about. See Findings §5.
